mnemonics.title: HDFS Components
mnemonics.content: No Dog Should Nap - NameNode, DataNode, Secondary NameNode

mnemonics.title: MapReduce Phases
mnemonics.content: MRS - Map, Reduce, Shuffle (order: Map -> Shuffle -> Reduce)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine 3 photocopy machines making copies of documents stored in different rooms
Picture conveyor belts splitting items (map), sorting them (shuffle), then packaging (reduce)

analogies.analogy: Like a library catalog that tracks book locations without storing the books themselves
Similar to dividing paperwork among office workers (map) then compiling reports (reduce)
